purpose: Freeze new source-only procedure families and untouched opaque forms under the independently committed output contract before any generator or executor call.

charter_decision_filter.artifact: Two new source/proposition corpora, four untouched task forms, private fair-basis endpoint specs, pinned generation policies, conformance witnesses, and a mutation-tested zero-call preflight.
charter_decision_filter.uncertainty: Whether the output identity, fidelity, and leakage contract can govern a prospective source-to-procedure instrument before generation.
charter_decision_filter.duplication_and_scope: Uses new allocation and dependency-graph structures as cross-domain synthetic contrasts; v1/v2 bytes remain untouched and these families do not define benchmark scope.
charter_decision_filter.useful_completion: Every frozen-input and contract-conformance gate passes with zero model, provider, generator, or executor attempts and all claim ceilings false.

chronology.rule: The committed contract predates source authoring; every proposition predates its source freeze; both source freezes predate all public/private task forms; generation may occur only in a later separately queued task after this protocol is committed and pushed.

families.structure: indivisible numerical apportionment with ranking, protected capacity, and conservation ledger
graph closure and identity-changing transformation producing a lineage manifest

source_only_generation.instruction: Produce one reusable procedure from the assigned exact corpus only. Preserve every proposition and each contradiction, threshold, artifact convention, and failure signature through a reciprocal binding or typed omission. Do not infer a task, identifier, filename, endpoint, check, rubric, answer, or claim beyond structural conformance.
source_only_generation.visible_input_rule: Each family policy exposes exactly its one corpus path; reference witnesses, task forms, private keys, protocol, rubrics, and repository context are denied.
source_only_generation.reference_package_role: Builder-authored conformance witness used only to prove exhaustive valid bindings and mutation sensitivity; it is not generated output, a treatment, an executor aid, or evidence of transfer.
source_only_generation.future_generation_rule: A later queue task must use these exact committed and pushed bytes, run once per family, retain invalid output without repair, and stop before treatment/checker/executor work on any failed gate.

leakage_scrubs.failure_action: Fail before any model/provider/generator/executor attempt; never repair frozen or candidate bytes in place.
